title: Neo Beta Remastered
description: A Modpack that adds the required features for Classic Reimagined 10
body:
# Neo Beta Remastered

Neo Beta Remastered is a modpack tailored for enthusiasts who appreciate the aesthetics of vintage Minecraft while desiring the depth and functionalities of contemporary versions. It operates on the latest Minecraft builds, providing access to new biomes, blocks, and mechanics, all presented through the Classic Reimagined 10 texture pack. This pack faithfully reinterprets the original Beta textures with enhanced resolution and shader compatibility, resulting in a nostalgic yet refined visual experience.

## Showcase video
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Ovu0cAG6KOY" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# About the Modpack:
The modpack does not modify fundamental gameplay mechanics—combat, crafting, and world generation remain aligned with modern standards—but the visual enhancement fosters a strong sense of nostalgia. It is ideal for builders aiming to recreate Beta-style environments using modern tools, or for adventurers who appreciate the charm of the past without compromising on performance and features. Neo Beta Remastered stands as a homage to Minecraft’s heritage, reimagined for the players of today.

## Mods used in this modpack (For Fabric)

### **Performance mods (Forge/Fabric)**
- **[OptiFine (Forge only)](https://optifine.net/)**
  - adds all required dependencies for Minecraft Classic Reimagined, without the need for other mods.

### **Custom Entity Models (Fabric)**
- **[Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** (For Minecraft 1.21 and below):
  - Adds flexibility to customize entity appearances in both Fabric and Forge versions.

### **Custom Colors (Fabric)**
- **[Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)** (For Minecraft 1.21 and below):
  - Introduces dynamic coloring options, enriching the visual aesthetic of your world.

### **Connected Textures (Fabric)**
- **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)** (For Minecraft 1.21 and below):
  - Delivers uninterrupted textures, creating a cohesive and polished look for blocks and items.
